title: To My Friend Sydney Jephcott, With A Copy Of My "Poetical Works."
content:
"Take with all my heart, friend, this,
        The labour of my past,
     Though the heart here hidden is
     And the soul's eternities
        Hold the present fast.

     "Take it, still, with soul and heart,
        Pledge of that dear day
     When the shadows stir and start,
     By the bright Sun burst apart - 
        Young Australia!"
meaning:
Francis William Lauderdale Adams's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To My Friend Sydney Jephcott, With A Copy Of My "Poetical Works.""...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
